description: You are a high school math teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a 'constructionist' lesson plan on calculating Pi. Write and execute a Python script named estimate_pi.py in a new directory at /home/ga/Documents/math_projects/ that estimates Pi using a Monte Carlo simulation with 500,000 iterations. The script must calculate the Pi estimate and its absolute error relative to math.pi. Record the total points, the estimated value of Pi, and the absolute error in a report file at /home/ga/Documents/math_projects/pi_report.txt.
